programme.desc: Kate deals with Laura's insubordination; Ross is at his wits' end with Rhylee's attitude; a charter guest pursues Adrian romantically; Ashton leads the crew in a musical performance for the guests; Rhylee's feelings for Tyler grow stronger.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: The crew's wild evening out prompts a passionate, late-night tryst for Rhylee and Tyler, but there's trouble in paradise for Ashton and Laura; Josiah faces childhood insecurities when guests remind him of the bullies he faced while coming out.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Tyler asks Rhylee out on a date; Ashton and Laura's relationship grows stronger; the crew welcomes the final charter guests who prove to be tough clients; while drama unfolds between the charter guests, a spoiled primary guest tests Kate's limits.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Adrian's plan for a centerpiece filled with living sea creatures is nixed by Kate; Rhylee feels awkward around Tyler; Laura and Ashton make plans for the future; Kate forgets the primary's birthday; Laura confronts Adrian.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Things don't go as planned as the crew tries to stream a football game; Ben redeems himself after the moussaka mishap; Jen feels like she's being assigned all the tedious tasks; Hannah confronts Tiffany over unfinished duties.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Bobby and Danny bring women back to the yacht; the crew struggles to keep up with the demands of an all-female group of guests who charter the yacht for a calendar shoot; as the crew assists with the shoot, Danny breaks the number one rule.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Disobeying a direct order, Danny gives a love poem to a charter guest; Bobby's feelings for Julia grow stronger; Tiffany works harder on her steward skills; Ben is shocked when he finds one of the stewards in his bunk with Bryan.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: The stewards are tasked with putting together a country hoedown complete with bales of hay for charter guests from Oklahoma; the guests appear to have a threesome in the hot tub, and Danny lands in hot water for overstepping his boundaries.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: While charter guests celebrate their seven-month dating anniversary, the crew strives to make their trip as romantic as possible; Ben and Hannah go on a date; the crew springs into action to help save a nearby vessel that has begun to sink.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Hannah and Ben redefine their relationship; after a flirtation with Hannah, Bobby realizes he can't turn off his feelings for Julia; Ben makes s'mores during a beach barbecue; Bryan takes the captain's orders to heart; Danny falls seriously ill.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: While Danny is away at the hospital, the crew revels in his absence; Jen finally stands up to Bryan; Tiffany's feelings for Ben increase; as one easy-going charter leaves, the crew is blind-sided by a new group of highly demanding guests.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: The demanding charter extends their stay, and Hannah puts on her best "stew" face to regain their trust; Julia and Ben engage in class warfare after a miscommunication; the captain gives Danny his phone back; Ben and Hannah's friendship deepens.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo intenta localizar a los terroristas que están detrás del atentado que hirió a Gibbs, se enteran de que el grupo terrorista está planeando otro atentado de la magnitud del 11-S, y que Gibbs tiene información sobre su plan.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny piensa en retirarse hasta que Erin lo llama para ayudarla con un caso que involucra a su ex, Jack. Jamie y Eddie se infiltran como pareja, y Frank enfrenta a la nueva alcaldesa, Margaret Dutton.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Erin contra la famosa traficante de personas Chao Lin (Tia Carrera) se pone en peligro cuando el juez a cargo aparece muerto, y Danny y Baez deben investigar el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank recibe una orden de la alcaldesa para asistir a un desfile en honor a un hombre que estuvo en prisión por conspirar en un ataque contra la policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es cuestionado por un Comité del Senado a raíz de la pérdida de Prentiss. Mientras, una cara familiar regresa de forma inesperada para ayudar al equipo a con este caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC es llamada a Oklahoma cuando unas mujeres están siendo asesinadas, después de ser torturadas con ácido sulfúrico.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga un asesinato masivo en una empresa de seguridad de Internet en las cercanías de Charlottesville, pero las pistas revelan que no es un asesino en serie normal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo UAC viaja a Idaho, donde un asesino en serie fija como objetivo a los sobrevivientes de la masacre de la secundaria Boise de hace 10 años.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Mientras que cada integrante del equipo lidia con la ausencia de un retirado Gibbs, el pasado de Ziva la acecha cuando es testigo del asesinato de un militar perpetrado por su antiguo compañero del Mossad.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando un convicto encarcelado por el agente del FBI Fornell escapa y amenaza a él y a su pequeña hija, Gibbs vuelve del retiro para re abrir su caso.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS es llamado a la escena del bizarro asesinato de un Contramaestre quien era parte de una operación encubierta de armas.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Al investigar el caso de un fallecido soldado de primera encontrado por un agente de bienes raíces, el equipo descubre que el cuerpo había sido enterrado en el jardín y luego exhumado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Sonia trajo de Cuba a su novio Pedro para casarse con él, pero en la despedida de soltera tiene sexo con un stripper. El hijo de María murió ahogado con una de las piezas de un Fidget Spinner.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Taimy culpa a su cuñado de la muerte de su hermana inválida por dejarla sola durante los incendios forestales. Braida admira a su amiga Brayda, a quien le ha copiado todo, incluso el nombre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: José Luis huye con toda su familia, pero en la frontera no dejan pasar a su esposa porque no tiene visa. Además, a Berenice le gusta mirar hombres, se excita vacilándolos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Raúl cumplió injusta prisión por un crimen que no cometió, cobró indemnización y su ex reclama su parte. Además, Laura estudia audiovisuales y Ruby rompió su cámara por grabar un cortometraje.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien

programme.title: Destrucción

programme.title: Desde mi cielo
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a la adolescente de 14 años Susie Salmon, ella deja atrás una vida inconclusa. Ahora, desde su lugar en un extraño pero hermoso mundo intermedio, ella debe ayudar a su padre a atrapar a su asesino.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Bajo anestesia
programme.desc: Mientras se somete a una cirugía, un joven adinerado experimenta una conciencia intraoperatoria y descubre que el equipo quirúrgico tenía la intención de asesinarlo.

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa
programme.desc: Demi Moore y Woody Harrelson son Diana y David Murphy, una pareja corta de dinero que apuesta a un viaje corto a Las Vegas que les dé una mano de suerte. Pero las probabilidades parecen más atractivas cuando el millonario John Gage sube la apuesta.

programme.title: Cuenta final
programme.desc: Nick Wells, es un veterano ladrón, decidido reivindicarse, vivir con su novia y poner un club de jazz. Pero su amigo Max, le propone un último trabajo que lo hará pasar por imprevistos y traiciones.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto?

programme.title: Por las plumas

programme.title: The Good Boss
programme.desc: Oscar winner Javier Bardem is a charismatic factory owner in this irreverent workplace comedy who crosses every imaginable ethical line to win a coveted Business Excellence award. Shortlisted for the 2022 Oscar for Best International Feature Film.

programme.title: El verano de los peces voladores
programme.desc: Manena va de vacaciones con su padre, Francisco, a una parte del sur de Chile. Ella descubre que la obsesión de su padre por atrapar todos los peces carpa en su laguna artificial está haciendo enojar a la tribu Mapuche local, así que tiene que detenerlo.

programme.title: La tierra y la sombra
programme.desc: Alfonso es un viejo campesino que retorna después de 17 años al hogar que abandonó debido a que su único hijo padece de una grave enfermedad. Al llegar a la región descubre que todo lo que alguna vez conoció ya no existe.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: Una navidad para saborear
programme.desc: Scarlett es una chef increíble pero cada año, sus platos navideños nunca se venden! Así que este año, su mejor amiga le compra un boleto para una escapada de cocina navideña en una hermosa villa... donde Scarlett volverá a aprender la cocina festiva.

programme.title: Juntos en Navidad

programme.title: Pueblo Navideño

programme.title: Karen y los fantasmas de navidad
programme.desc: Karen es una mujer de mediana edad que, debido a su actitud exigente y arrogante, ha alienado a sus amigos y familia. Un día, Karen recibe una visita por parte de unos espíritus no convencionales.

programme.title: Una navidad para saborear
programme.desc: Scarlett es una chef increíble pero cada año, sus platos navideños nunca se venden! Así que este año, su mejor amiga le compra un boleto para una escapada de cocina navideña en una hermosa villa... donde Scarlett volverá a aprender la cocina festiva.

programme.title: Juntos en Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer se enamora mientras alquila la casa de huéspedes de un joven padre en Navidad.

programme.title: Pueblo Navideño
programme.desc: Una adicta al trabajo sospecha de la partida repentina de su padre para mudarse a un pequeño pueblo en Navidad.

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: El bosque maldito
programme.desc: En una noche, el hijo de Sarah desaparece dentro del bosque detrás de su casa de campo. Cuando regresa, se ve igual, pero su comportamiento se convierte cada vez más inquietante.

programme.title: El maestro de las ilusiones
programme.desc: Harry es un detective privado que recibe más de que esperaba cuando se encuentra con Philip Swan, un ilusionista que está cautivando al mundo. ¿Pero son realmente ilusiones? Harry no están tan seguro.

programme.title: Solomon Kane (ESP)
programme.desc: El capitán Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) es una máquina de matar brutalmente eficiente del siglo XVI.

programme.title: Texas: masacre en cadena 2
programme.desc: La familia de psicópatas asesinos más peligrosa vuelve a la carga. Después de secuestrar a la DJ Vantia Block, deben enfrentarse a un policía texano que los persigue.

programme.title: El maestro de las ilusiones
programme.desc: Harry es un detective privado que recibe más de que esperaba cuando se encuentra con Philip Swan, un ilusionista que está cautivando al mundo. ¿Pero son realmente ilusiones? Harry no están tan seguro.

programme.title: Solomon Kane (ESP)
programme.desc: El capitán Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) es una máquina de matar brutalmente eficiente del siglo XVI.

programme.title: Resucitados
programme.desc: Un grupo de investigadores médicos descubren una manera de revivir a los pacientes muertos.

programme.title: Gunsight Ridge
programme.desc: Stage line agent investigates a series of robberies by taking the job of a deputy sheriff in a border Arizona town.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers (1959)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: Red River (1948)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Strategic Air Command
programme.desc: Aviation and sports come together as a baseball player is recalled to Air Force duty.

programme.title: The High and the Mighty
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Dan Roman, a veteran pilot haunted by a tragic past. Now relegated to second-incommand cockpit assignments, he finds himself scheduled on a routine Honolulu-to-San Francisco flight – one that takes a terrifying turn.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments (1956)
programme.desc: Raised as an Egyptian prince, Moses (Charlton Heston) discovers his Hebrew heritage, hears God's call, and engages in a bitter battle with the Pharaoh Ramses (Yul Brynner) to free the Jews from slavery, leading them to the Promised Land.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: The glorious epic style of Cecil B. DeMille is exemplified in this story of the Bible's legendary strongman and the woman who seduces, then betrays him.

programme.title: Car 54, Where Are You?: Love Finds Muldoon
programme.desc: Lucille tries to match Muldoon up with a spinster woman.

programme.title: Car 54, Where Are You?: Gypsy Curse
programme.desc: Toody gets a spell placed on him by a gypsy when he tries to uncover her theft ring.

programme.title: Car 54, Where Are You?: Thirty Days Notice
programme.desc: The Toody's give their landlord their thirty days notice before leaving.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Petrie home becomes a command post when a neighbor's home is put under surveillance.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob is cast opposite an Italian actress in a low-budget film and turns out to be a terrible on-screen lover.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate battles rural postmasters to recover an ill-advised letter from the mails.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Tomboy Betty Jo goes looking for a husband on the premise that fate has singles her out to become the next bride in the community.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: High- schooler Betty Jo poses as a college coed to gain the interest of a handsome college boy.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo takes pity on the only boy in her home economics class and induces her mother to help him win a passing grade.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: All the Bradley's expect to be a big winner in the contests they enter at the county-fair until Uncle Joe gives them a hand.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Gluttonous jurors,lodged at the Shady Rest hotel, refuse to reach a verdict because they like Kate's food so much.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter plans to use Gomer to win the inter-squad competition.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and Carter are the only ones who don't come down with German measles.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter sets out to expose a fraud by proving to Gomer that the man who sold him a cheap watch is a crook.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is accused by a drunk's wife of turning her husband into an alcoholic.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter sabotages Gomer's garden by putting vodka in his prize watermelon.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter sends Gomer to a psychiatrist when he claims he has seen men from outer space.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is arrested after wrecking Sgt. Carter's car.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa play host to four children from the city, who find themselves in Hooterville as part of a rural exposure program. The kids learn how to milk the cow, pick vegetables, plant seeds, and share sleeping quarters with four-legged friends.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa and Oliver try to sort out of the troubles of fools in love. The problems begin when Eb invites both his girlfriend and another young woman to the same dance, while Arnold the pig falls for not one, but two attractive bovines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa tells a rather fanciful version of how she met and fell in love with Oliver. The Douglases' house guest, little Lori Baker from the city, is all ears. The tale begins with how Lisa's father, the king, was exiled, causing Lisa to flee to Paris.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: In order to clear an innocent man Barnaby races against time to find an escaped convict who's testimony can set him free. Also trying to find the same convict is a bounty hunter with a reputation for bringing his quarry in dead.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby helps reunite a mother with her daughter on the day the daughter is released from prison. Then they ask him to find the daughter's little boy who is on the run with the ex-boyfriend, and he also happens to be involved in arms dealing.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Hume Cronyn returns in a guest star appearance as Lewis Avery Filer, the criminal with a thousand faces, who escapes from the Oahu prison after devising a scheme to steal $4-million from drug smugglers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A young woman is forced to fake a suicide attempt so that her fiancée' will come out of hiding — a gambling czar wants him dead.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A powerful unknown source sets up an elaborate scheme to frame McGarrett as a thief.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett learns that communist agent Wo Fat needs 90 seconds in order to carry out his plot against a U.S. missile tracking base.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A young Hawaiian girl is assaulted in a parking lot, and a braggart soldier is arrested and tried for the crime. The soldier is found guilty, but a fact in his medical history leads McGarrett to believe the wrong man may have been convicted.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil (Howard Rollins) and Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) are faced with a violent labor strike at the local Sparta river plant. And tension runs even higher when a local city councilman is murdered when he tries to intervene between the two sides.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high in the police department and in Sparta when Bubba is accused of attacking a black woman. And when a second woman comes forward from Bubba's past with similar claims, Virgil steps in to try and help clear his name.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sparta is celebrating their high school's victory at the regional basketball tournament, but the shock of a deadly hit-and-run accident after the game turns their happiness into a nightmare. Detective Tibbs struggles to find the driver responsible.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While Chief Bill Gillespie is out of town, a series of mysterious fires break out in town. Virgil (Howard Rollins) and the rest of the Sparta police department struggle to find out who is setting these arson fires that soon turn deadly.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a couple walking their dog in the forest discover a human leg bone, the Sparta police immediately question an eccentric old lady named Adah Boone, known as the Pig Lady, who lives nearby and who everyone believes is a witch.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Detective Tibbs investigates Chief Gillespie's kidnapping, all the signs seem to point to a racially motivated crime, but Virgil and officer Bubba Skinner are convinced that acting Chief Tom Dugan may somehow be involved.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Robbins cross paths with two men pushed to their breaking points: an ex-con nursing a grudge against the former assistant district attorney who put him in prison and a struggling small businessman with a hot temper.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker gets a sinking feeling in his guts when, after arresting two guys for trying to rob a club and shooting the bartender, Alex sets them free and won't give them a reason as to why it all happened.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is working for the game conservation service, stocking lakes with fish. When an eager angler asks where the next batch is to be placed, Kimble refuses the information before learning the man wears a badge beneath his fishing jacket.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble, a patient in a hospital in Decatur, IL, regains consciousness after an accident and is persuaded by therapist Dr. Towne that he may kill again if he remains at large.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble, running away from a police roadblock, seeks refuge on a farm owned by the Braydon family. Mattie Braydon, the blind daughter, befriends him but Kimble soon discovers that she uses her affliction at other people's expense.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When Maria Romburg begins to press him for a commitment, a nervous MacGyver escapes into a fantasy that takes him to the Old West.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver is drawn into a labor dispute between grape growers and laborers, he discovers the growers are spraying illegal chemicals.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After experiencing a 'close encounter' of his own, MacGyver begins an investigation of UFO sightings in a small farming community.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda have brough their kids to the set of Frontier Dad, a popular western TV series, to watch the filming of an action sequence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan must solve the murder of renowned chef Rene Fontenot, however, with Rene being a ladies man and a successful chef with many competitors, the list of suspects keeps growing and Amanda finds herself among the accused.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in the middle of another murder investigation that hits too close to home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in unfamiliar territory when a string of murders seem to be connected to a state of the art computer system and its not so stable inventor and owner Bruce Locatelli.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Steve return home from a fishing trip to a shocking discovery - the bloody and beaten body of Mickey, the young medical student who, along with his wife Jill, also a medical student, had been house-sitting for them.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper discovers he had forgotten about the message under his bed. Shelly and Bobby begin Leo's home care. Sternwood hears pretrial motions and declares Leo not fit for trial. Nadine comes home, still thinking she's in high school.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: James saves the girls from a tormented Harold. Cooper brings Audrey home. Bobby and Shelly learn that their insurance plans have backfired. Donna tries to convince Truman that Harold Smith has Laura's secret diary.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After bad luck continues to befall the family, the Brady boys set out to learn about the ancient tiki. They learn the tiki is tabu and must be discarded at an ancient burial ground.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady boys arrive at the cave to return the idol to the burial site, only to be held prisoners by an angry archaeologist who lays claim to the cave and believes that they stole the idol.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia is apprehensive about her first day of high school, so Mike asks Greg to help break the ice for her. Meanwhile, Peter tries to make a working volcano for the Science Club.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter has a crush on Jan's new friend but every plan to impress her backfires. Inspired by "Cyrano de Bergerac", he launches a final plan to win her over with Greg's help but it also backfires when she falls for Greg instead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A mugger tries to attack Archie in his cab ... but this time, Archie strikes back with some pepper spray. So why is Archie the one facing criminal charges?

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Worried when her baby is nine days overdue, Gloria snaps at Mike. Mike tries to be nice to his wife, but then he forgets that her baby shower is scheduled on a day when he has plans.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is a nervous wreck because he wants to back out of the annual minstrel show at the lodge, which he has successfully avoided for several years.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is forced to show up at the hospital for the birth of his grandchild in black face, When his lodge brothers refused to give him their cold cream because he left, He and Edith are surprised to discover that Mike and Gloria haven't arrived

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: In the wake of the birth of little Joey, Gloria and Michael are at odds with one another over communication issues.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie babysits little Joey with the help of his friends during their poker game.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie has ulterior motives when he befriends a Jewish watchmaker, who has a sure-fire invention that the world has been waiting for.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's support of hiring quotas faces a stern test when he is passed over for a promotion to a less-qualified black man. Mike confronts the hiring manager, but his big mouth gets him in trouble again.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Claude comes up with a scheme, telling Vint that he could make nearly two thousand dollars by marrying a woman who needs her green card. Mama tells Vint if discovered, he could be in serious trouble and Vint decides not to do it.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Eunice buys a tape and begins thinking positively. She becomes very cheerful and finally gets a role in a production at the Playhouse. When the show's star, Sally, cuts her lines, Eunice and Sally fight.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint threatens to move out of the house after stealing Mama's silver and pawning it for bail money for his slacker friend Claude.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Buzz and Sonja think Mama's old 1940s clothes would be perfect for a school dance. When the theme of the dance is changed to punk, Mama heads to the school to get her clothes, saving the dance when the band doesn't show up.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi's ex-husband comes to town with the goal of winning Naomi back. Vint believes Leonard has returned to make up for the bad way he treated her, and Naomi decides to tell Leonard that she won't leave with him.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen announces that she was named Raytown's Woman of the Year. At the Banquet, Ellen is having a delightful time, until her family arrives and embarrasses her at the Country Club.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi isn't feeling well, leading Mama to think she is pregnant. The family starts fighting because none of them want to give up their rooms for a new baby.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi, Ellen, and Eunice are in a panic at the hospital because Mama has had an accident. Vint comes and asks what has happened, but each of the women has their own tale about how it happened.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi gets an obscene phone call and doesn't tell the family until the guy calls again. The family unsuccessfully tries to figure out why this guy is after Naomi, blaming her in the process. The family later apologizes.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen has met an attractive, younger man named Glen, but doesn't want Mama to meet him because of the age difference. After the family learns Glen is Ellen's new boyfriend, Mama freaks out.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: As Al prepares to chest to see that Kelly is named Miss Spring Break, Marcy and Bud lead some burned fraternity brothers to Florida for revenge.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: A Jefferson anniversary surprise is ruined when a drunken tattoo artist misspells Marcy's name.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: To secure a big promotion at the bank, Marcy must first buy Al's car for her Japanese boss.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud's unauthorized use of the library threatens his graduation.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al and Marcy clash over a doghouse for Lucky.

programme.title: Grieg's Piano Concerto & Beethoven Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Conductor Jan Latham-Koenig leads the Flanders Symphony Orchestra in a concert recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium; Felix Mendelssohn's concert overture Die Hebrides, Op. 26; Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor, Op. 16.

programme.title: Mahler: Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Christoph Eschenbach leads the Orchestre de Paris in the 7th Symphony by Gustav Mahler.

programme.title: Chamber music by Mozart and Shostakovich
programme.desc: French violinist Renaud Capuçon appears at the festival Les Coups de Cœur de Chantilly, presenting a chamber music program consisting of classical and 20th century repertoire. He performs with the soloists of the International Menuhin Music Academy.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: La Bayadere
programme.desc: The Paris Opera Ballet performs the work choreographed by Rudolf Nureyev.

programme.title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 5 in C Minor, Op. 67
programme.desc: Les Dissonances perform Ludwig van Beethoven's Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67 at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Descent Into the Maelstrom
programme.desc: In the 1980s, Philip Glass creates music for the Australian Dance Theatre based on "Descent into the Maelstrom" by Edgar Allan Poe.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 9 in D Minor, Op. 125
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, maestro Jordan presents Beethoven's final symphony: Symphony No. 9 in D minor, Op. 125.

programme.title: Fantasymphony - A Concert of Fire and Magic
programme.desc: The Danish National Symphony Orchestra once again opens the gates to magical worlds with a concert program; under the baton of Christian Schumann, the bands team up and perform from "Lord of the Rings," "The Witcher," "League of Legends" and more.

programme.title: Noseda Conducts Liszt, Strauss and Rota
programme.desc: Nino Rota aims to give everyone a moment of happiness; his "Third Symphony" sparkles with Italian sunlight.

programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between men whose baggage includes wearing a thong and always complaining at restaurants.

programme.desc: Yota brings Hina to his house; Hina hatches a variety of schemes to help Yota get closer to Izanami; Yota helps his sister with a summer assignment.

programme.title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid
programme.desc: Tohru's now capable of handling the housework perfectly, and at Miss Kobayashi's request, she decides to make the best omurice for dinner one night; however, gathering high quality ingredients would put her over budget.

programme.title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este caso internacional de extorsión, asesinato e identidades robadas, el estafador Albert J. Walker asume la identidad del compañero de trabajo, Ronald Platt. Platt luego aparece muerto en un océano con un ancla atada alrededor de su torso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Alianza nefasta
programme.desc: Cuando una joven desapareció, la policía temió que fuera la última víctima de una serie de crímenes similares.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesinato de un turista estadounidense en un centro turístico mexicano centró los recursos policiales en ambos lados de la frontera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Afición al veneno
programme.desc: Tres muertes aparentemente no relacionadas resultaron ser asesinatos en serie. El asesino había tenido cuidado: usó veneno que no tenía sabor ni olor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.desc: When Alli is offered a scholarship to MIT, her parents are bursting with pride -- but is it the right choice? Meanwhile, Jake decides college isn't for him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli makes a difficult choice about her future. With a little help from Katie, Jake tries to prove himself to his father. Cam snaps at Maya before a big game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna bonds with Becky -- and Becky's hot brother, Luke -- but will religious differences come between them? Clare obsesses over her journalism mentor, Asher. Drew is offered a job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna gets baptized, but did she do it for the wrong reasons? Drew is failing his classes, and considers dropping out of Degrassi. Connor's tweets embarrass Clare in front of Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to impress Asher by pitching a story about Romeo and Jules. K.C. and Bianca play matchmaker for K.C.'s mom. Katie chaperones Maya's date with Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A secret is eating away at Clare, but will facing the truth make things worse for her? K.C.'s mom has some surprising news. Meanwhile, Maya tries to impress Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam needs a break from hockey, so he blows off practice to hang out with Maya. K.C.'s dad is release from jail, but is he ready to have him back in the picture? Fiona's loft is a disaster, and she blames her new roommate -- Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam struggles to live up to everyone's expectations on the ice. K.C. wants his dad out of his life -- even if it means doing something drastic. Drew and Fiona try to work out their differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen designs an elaborate set for Romeo and Jules, and reaches out to her estranged mother for the money to build it. Meanwhile, Becky interferes with ticket sales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan becomes involved in more than politics when he accepts an invitation to attend an election campaign party. A face in a crowd of well-wishers awakens old memories for Mayor Ridgeway's wife, Lauren, with murderous results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A tense situation erupts into a hotbed of chaos! While awaiting treatment from Dr. Sloan, convicted criminal John Dunbar unexpectedly jumps his guards and seizes a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake causes widespread damage and Dr. Sloan's hospital goes on emergency power. After the tremors stop, Mark's friend Martin Garfield is found dead in the ruins of his mansion nearby. Was it the earthquake or murder?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve's undercover waterfront surveillance causes city-wide panic. His suspect, a gangland hit man, has suddenly developed the plague!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's double trouble for Dr. Sloan in this second season premiere. What could be worse than an IRS tax audit?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While confronting board members about embezzled charity funds, chairman Elton Malone mysteriously keels over dead. And, one by one, all of the suspects also wind up murdered--at each other's funerals!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Sloan's wealthy womanizing patient, Robert Stroud, mysteriously disappears, Sloan uncovers a greedy plot hatched by the women in Stroud's life. It's a murderous plan ripe with blackmail and betrayal--and a shockingly twisted conclusion!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Now you see it, now you don't. A despised lawyer turns up murdered at Community General and before the police can arrive, the body mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a strange twist of fate when millionaire William Bissell, checks into the hospital and stumbles upon his ex-lover, Nurse Jenny Morgan. After Bissell's found murdered by lethal injection, Jenny becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of 'Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: The Mystery of Rome's X Tomb
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough shows us how ancient creatures have come to be preserved as fossils and how those fossils can shed light on characteristics of these creatures' lives, and even their death.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold

programme.desc: Steve explores differences between Mopar body types in design and appeal.

programme.desc: Steve is in Colorado to dive into AMC's rich history of 4x4 vehicles.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold

programme.desc: Steve is at an all-Mopar yard to show the evolution of the iconic Charger.

programme.desc: Steve Magnante examines a '62 Gran Turismo Hawk and other Studebakers.

programme.desc: Steve Magnante explores Chevy big-block and small-block V8 muscle cars.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve finds three great Furys and zeroes in on two C-body convertibles.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve tracks down several Buicks that delivered serious performance.

programme.desc: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.

programme.desc: A couple of German shepherd pups with a shadowy obedience track records; a rescue dog with trust issues.

programme.desc: An aggressive Manchester Terrier; a Wheaton Terrier with poor social skills; a dog who is afraid of the ocean.

programme.desc: A human psychologist calls Cesar for help when her pet pug and pet pig fight; an emotionally scarred German shepherd.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake runs for mayor against a surprising candidate--Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Hank, distraught over Myra quitting, ends up comatose.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A new railroad through town means a bright future for Colorado Springs, but an uncertain one for Dr. Mike and Sully.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren and Brian plot different courses to prove they're courageous men, until danger unites them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren's sister, Miss Olive, has died and bequeathed her cattle to Matthew who, along with Dr. Mike, Sully, Colleen, Brian, Loren, Robert E, and Grace, attempts to bring the cattle back to a ranch near Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Cattle Drive continues with various difficulties to overcome, including conflicts between Matthew and Sully, cattle rustlers, hungry Indians, and a prairie fire. Dr. Mike delivers a calf, and Sully helps her clean up afterwards.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Elizabeth sends crates of books from Michaela's deceased father's collection, prompting her to open a public library. Many become alarmed at the content of some of the books and want to prevent people from reading them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Cloud Dancing and the rest of the Cheyenne are told to move to a reservation where they would be dependent on handouts. Dr. Mike, Sully, and the children head to Washington to lodge a complaint and get the order changed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Arriving in Washington, Dr. Mike and Sully find it difficult to find anyone to listen to their concerns. Sully is arrested for army desertion, while a plot against the president is overheard. Michaela must break Sully out of jail to expose the conspiracy.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When money becomes short for Sully, he tries everything to make ends meet rather than accept help from Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully are traveling through dangerous Indian country when their stagecoach is robbed, and they are abandoned.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake grows suspicious of Peter DeVilbis; Claudia receives more violets from 'Lancelot'; Adam tells Blake the truth of the poisoning incident; after suffering a seizure, Kirby undergoes emergency surgery and loses her baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Allegre is returned, and Blake's suspicions about Peter's involvement are founded; Tracy orchestrates a press campaign to ruin Krystle; learning her fiancé has left the country, Fallon dashes from the hotel and is struck by a truck.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis, caught while trying to leave the country, is arrested for possession of drugs and jailed; Blake is offered a political post; Fallon regains consciousness and learns she is paralyzed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle learns she is pregnant; Fallon suffers from painful headaches; Claudia and Steven visit Matthew's accident site in Peru; once home, however, Claudia receives a phone call from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis makes a plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex finds Alexis with Rashid and turns to Tracy for comfort; learning the reasons behind her father's death, Kirby buys a gun; the mysterious caller turns out to be a tape-recorded message; Alexis moves ahead with her plan to ruin Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns that Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder
programme.desc: A sugar plantation worker tied his daughter to a bed and went to work. Unable to escape, she died in a fire. Claims from the staff of Hawaii's Plantation Village in Waipahu.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.
